what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-assets image asset named Floorplan_Gold; it stores the asset identifier, channel, path, content-addressed blob reference, MIME type, provenance, versioning, and an empty links list.
observations: The record describes a PNG image asset in the design-assets channel at icons/Floorplan_Gold
Width and height are both recorded as 0
There is exactly one version (v1) with the same blob and no alt text
Source is listed as dragnet and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
created and updated timestamps are identical
standouts: An image asset record with zero width and height
Single-version entry with empty alt text and no links
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger-style metadata
address uses an image:// URI scheme
blob uses a blob://b2 content-addressed scheme
Version history is captured in a versions array
concerns: Width and height are 0 for a raster image, suggesting dimensions were not extracted
alt text is empty, reducing accessibility and discoverability
No links or contextual relationships are recorded
notes: A bare ledger stub for a gold floorplan icon PNG with unresolved dimensions and no relationships.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?
What does the dragnet source indicate about how this asset was obtained?
Where is the actual blob stored and how is it retrieved?
What is the intended UI/UX use of the Floorplan_Gold icon?
Why is the alt text empty?
purpose_vs_actual: The file serves as an asset catalog entry, but it only partially fulfills that role because it lacks extracted dimensions and descriptive alt text.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register and version a design-assets icon image in a content-addressed ledger, capturing authorship and a stable blob reference.
novelty: An image ledger entry that records width and height as 0, which is atypical for a raster asset.
contribution: It provides a canonical identifier, content-addressed blob reference, MIME type, and provenance metadata for the Floorplan_Gold icon, supporting retrieval and versioning even though descriptive metadata is minimal.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata file for a design-assets PNG icon named Floorplan_Gold, referencing blob b2:4e4e94546f0c5ba1b2a8635a2c7d1be2 with zero recorded dimensions and empty links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a gold floorplan icon image in the design-assets channel with provenance and a stable blob reference.
